_comment: Track D matched task set for the generation-reliability baseline. Language-neutral algorithms only (no Aury-gate demos). Each task carries a natural-language intent, the exact function signature the model must produce (so the oracle can call it on both sides), and concrete input->output oracle checks. `aury record` (generate.py) turns these into per-language prompts; `aury eval-generated` replays recorded model outputs through the gates and scores Aury-vs-baseline. Grow toward >=30 tasks.

tasks.name: add
tasks.intent: Return the sum of two integers a and b.

tasks.name: gcd
tasks.intent: Return the greatest common divisor of two non-negative integers a and b (Euclid's algorithm; gcd(a,0)=a).

tasks.name: factorial
tasks.intent: Return n! (the product of 1..n) for a non-negative integer n; factorial(0)=1.

tasks.name: fib
tasks.intent: Return the n-th Fibonacci number, 0-indexed: fib(0)=0, fib(1)=1, fib(n)=fib(n-1)+fib(n-2).

tasks.name: is_prime
tasks.intent: Return 1 if n is a prime number, else 0. n < 2 is not prime.

tasks.name: isqrt
tasks.intent: Return the integer square root of a non-negative integer n (the largest k with k*k <= n).
